title: Just Enough Freaky Additions (JEFA)
body:
Hey there! Going to the point.

## This mod (right now) adds 7 categories to JEI!
- Piglin Bartering
- Fishing Loot
- Trial Chamber Vault Looting
- Trial Chamber Spawners Looting
- Mob Interactions! (such as frogs eating magmacubes for froglight, turtles growing, armadillo being brushed...)
- Hero of the village rewards for each profession!
- Cat morning gifts (the things that a tamed cat brings when sleeps with player at morning)

Al this categories are **added procedurally with the game loot tables**, so is **datapack and mod compatible**! Even it should detect other mod's villagers for the Hero of the Village category (not tested). Also detects enchantments, potion effects, item damage, and item quantity in loot tables procedurally!

## CLIENT/SERVER SIDE:
Client can have it without the server having it, it just will not sync the loot tables.
If both sides have the mod, the loot tables will sync, so the client can detect server datapacks or mods!
If the server has the mod, the client can't join without the mod.

## TRANSLATION
The mod has spanish and english translations.
